name: Poppy Seed Cheese Straws
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chilled butter into small dice.
2. Place flour in a bowl or on a pastry board.
3. Make a well in the center and add butter, salt, and 1 cup of water to the flour mixture.
4. Mix with a spatula until combined.
5. Add remaining water 1-2 tablespoons at a time, mixing after each addition.
6. Form dough into a ball and wrap in plastic.
7. Chill for 10 minutes if it becomes too soft to handle.
8. Roll out dough to a thickness of 3/8 inch (0.075 cm).
9. Brush the top with egg white and sprinkle generously with grated Parmesan cheese.
10. Fold ends together and roll into a log.
11. Cut into 1/2-inch strips.
12. Coat strips lightly in poppy seeds by rolling them in a shallow dish of poppy seeds.
13. Twist each strip to form a spiral shape.
14. Place twisted straws onto parchment paper, spaced evenly apart.
15. Chill for an additional 30 minutes.
16. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
17. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden and puffy. Remove from oven and serve immediately.
